tasks.title: Phase 1: Zero-Config Standalone Mode
tasks.description: Make Beacon work out of the box without Home Assistant. Install → 2-minute setup wizard → working dashboard.

subtasks.title: Setup wizard — guided onboarding flow
subtasks.description: First-launch wizard: family name, add members (name/avatar/color), enter zip code for weather. Should feel like setting up an iPhone — minimal steps, friendly UI.

subtasks.title: OpenWeatherMap integration
subtasks.description: Free tier weather API integration. User enters zip code during setup, Beacon fetches weather without HA. Needs API key management (built-in free key or user-provided).

subtasks.title: PWA support — service worker and offline
subtasks.description: Proper service worker for offline caching, manifest for installability, 'Add to Home Screen' prompt on mobile browsers.

subtasks.title: Default to standalone mode
subtasks.description: Local calendar, lists, and tasks should be the defaults. HA integration becomes an optional 'Connect Home Assistant' step in settings. Remove 'demo mode' messaging.

subtasks.title: Improve error states and empty states
subtasks.description: Friendly messages when things aren't configured. No API error codes shown to users. Helpful 'Get started' prompts instead of blank screens.

tasks.title: Phase 2: Direct Service Integrations
tasks.description: Connect to the services families already use — Google, Spotify, Apple — without requiring Home Assistant.

subtasks.title: Google Calendar OAuth integration
subtasks.description: Sign in with Google button, OAuth 2.0 flow, fetch all user calendars via Google Calendar API v3. Replace HA calendar dependency for standalone users.

subtasks.title: Google Photos API integration
subtasks.description: OAuth sign-in, browse/select albums, fetch photos for slideshow. Replace HA media directory dependency.

subtasks.title: Spotify Connect integration
subtasks.description: Spotify OAuth, playback control (play/pause/skip), now playing display, browse playlists. Spotify Web Playback SDK or Connect API.

subtasks.title: Apple Music via MusicKit JS
subtasks.description: MusicKit JS integration for Apple ecosystem families. Playback control, now playing, browse library.

subtasks.title: iCloud Calendar via CalDAV
subtasks.description: CalDAV integration for Apple calendar users who don't use Google.

subtasks.title: Todoist / Microsoft To-Do integration
subtasks.description: Direct API integrations for popular task management apps beyond HA todo entities.

tasks.title: Phase 3: Distribution
tasks.description: One-click install on any platform. Minimize friction to zero.

subtasks.title: Android APK on Play Store
subtasks.description: Capacitor build → signed APK → Play Store listing. Beacon as a native Android app.

subtasks.title: iOS app on App Store
subtasks.description: Capacitor build → Xcode archive → App Store submission. Beacon as a native iOS app.

subtasks.title: Docker one-liner self-hosting
subtasks.description: docker run -p 3000:3000 ghcr.io/asachs01/beacon — works on any server, NAS, or home lab.

subtasks.title: Raspberry Pi ready-to-flash image
subtasks.description: Pre-built image: flash SD card, plug in monitor, boot directly to Beacon in kiosk mode. Cheapest possible hardware path.

subtasks.title: Submit to official HA add-on repository
subtasks.description: Meet HA add-on store requirements, submit PR to community add-ons repo for wider visibility.

tasks.title: Phase 4: Polish & Delight
tasks.description: Make Beacon feel like a premium product that happens to be free.

subtasks.title: Interactive onboarding tutorial
subtasks.description: Walkthrough of features on first use — highlight each section, explain what it does, how to customize.

subtasks.title: Family invite links
subtasks.description: Share a URL to add family members from their own device. QR code on the display for easy scanning.

subtasks.title: Kiosk mode with auto-launch
subtasks.description: Prevent navigation away, auto-launch on boot, wake on touch, prevent screen burn-in.

subtasks.title: Touch-optimized gestures
subtasks.description: Swipe between views, pull to refresh, long-press for actions, pinch to zoom calendar.

subtasks.title: Push notifications
subtasks.description: Calendar reminders, chore reminders, family member alerts via browser push or native notifications.

subtasks.title: Accessibility — screen reader, high contrast, font scaling
subtasks.description: ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, high contrast theme, user-configurable font sizes.

subtasks.title: Internationalization (i18n)
subtasks.description: Extract all strings, support multiple languages. Start with Spanish, French, German.

tasks.title: Phase 5: Video Production
tasks.description: Automated video walkthrough series — 10 featurettes using ElevenLabs voice cloning + Playwright screen recordings.

subtasks.title: Set up demo data and recording environment
subtasks.description: Populate a Beacon instance with realistic demo data (calendar events, lists, chores, media, weather). Configure Playwright for headless screen recording at 1080p/30fps.

subtasks.title: Set up ElevenLabs voice profile
subtasks.description: Create or select a warm, conversational voice in ElevenLabs. Clone a voice or choose from the Voice Library. Test with sample narration from script 01.

subtasks.title: Produce featurette 01 — Meet Beacon
subtasks.description: Record screen footage using automation/01-meet-beacon.ts, generate voiceover from scripts/01-meet-beacon.md, composite with FFmpeg.

subtasks.title: Produce featurette 02 — Family Calendar
subtasks.description: Record screen footage using automation/02-family-calendar.ts, generate voiceover from scripts/02-family-calendar.md, composite with FFmpeg.

subtasks.title: Produce featurette 03 — Lists That Work
subtasks.description: Record screen footage using automation/03-lists-that-work.ts, generate voiceover from scripts/03-lists-that-work.md, composite with FFmpeg.

subtasks.title: Produce featurette 04 — Chore Tracking
subtasks.description: Record screen footage using automation/04-chore-tracking.ts, generate voiceover from scripts/04-chore-tracking.md, composite with FFmpeg.

subtasks.title: Produce featurette 05 — Music Control
subtasks.description: Record screen footage using automation/05-music-control.ts, generate voiceover from scripts/05-music-control.md, composite with FFmpeg.

subtasks.title: Produce featurette 06 — Weather Forecast
subtasks.description: Record screen footage using automation/06-weather-forecast.ts, generate voiceover from scripts/06-weather-forecast.md, composite with FFmpeg.

subtasks.title: Produce featurette 07 — Kitchen Timers
subtasks.description: Record screen footage using automation/07-multiple-timers.ts, generate voiceover from scripts/07-multiple-timers.md, composite with FFmpeg.

subtasks.title: Produce featurette 08 — Any Screen
subtasks.description: Record screen footage using automation/08-any-screen.ts (multi-viewport), generate voiceover from scripts/08-any-screen.md, composite with FFmpeg.

subtasks.title: Produce featurette 09 — Voice & AI
subtasks.description: Mixed recording: manual voice/AI demos + automated dashboard captures. Generate voiceover from scripts/09-voice-ai.md, composite with FFmpeg.

subtasks.title: Produce featurette 10 — Install
subtasks.description: Record HA add-on install flow using automation/10-install.ts, generate voiceover from scripts/10-install.md, composite with FFmpeg.

subtasks.title: Final review, title cards, and export
subtasks.description: Add Beacon logo title cards, intro/outro bumpers, consistent fade transitions. Export all 10 featurettes at 1080p MP4 for YouTube and 720p vertical for social.
